phrases.intent_en: Ask about climbing to the top of the lighthouse
phrases.text_local: Est-il possible de monter au sommet du phare ?
phrases.pronunciation: eh-TEEL po-SEEBL duh moh-TAY oh soh-VOM doo FAR
phrases.cultural_note: The lighthouse has 248 steps to the top. The climb is steep but the panoramic views over the Atlantic coast are spectacular.

responses.english: Yes, there are 248 steps. The view at the top is superb.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah duh-sahn-kah-rahnt-weet MARSH. lah vyoo ahn oh eh soo-PAIRB
responses.french: Oui, il y a 248 marches. La vue en haut est superbe.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how much the entry fee is
phrases.cultural_note: The lighthouse charges a small entry fee. Family tickets are available.

responses.english: Three euros per person. Free for children.
responses.phonetic: trwah uh-ROH par pair-SON. grah-TWEE poor lay zahn-FAHN
responses.french: Trois euros par personne. Gratuit pour les enfants.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view from the top
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la vue depuis le sommet ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah VYOO duh-PWEE luh soh-VOM
phrases.cultural_note: On clear days you can see the Spanish coast, the Pyrenees mountains, and the entire Basque coast from the lighthouse platform.

responses.english: On clear days, you can see the Spanish coast and the Pyrenees.
responses.phonetic: par tahn KLEHR, ohn vwah lah koht es-pah-NYOL ay lay pee-ray-NAY
responses.french: Par temps clair, on voit la côte espagnole et les Pyrénées.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un musée dans le phare ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un myoo-ZAY dan luh FAR
phrases.cultural_note: The lighthouse houses a small museum about lighthouse history and the life of lighthouse keepers. Entry is included in the climb ticket.

responses.english: Yes, a small museum is included with the ticket.
responses.phonetic: wee, uhn puh-TEE myoo-ZAY eh ahn-KLOO ah-VEK luh bee-YAY
responses.french: Oui, un petit musée est inclus avec le billet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the best time to visit for sunset
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la meilleure heure pour voir le coucher du soleil ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah may-YUR UHR poor VWAHR luh koo-SHAY doo soh-LAY
phrases.cultural_note: Sunset from the lighthouse is spectacular, facing west over the Atlantic. Arrive 30 minutes before sunset for the best light.

responses.phonetic: ah-ree-VAY trahnt mee-NOOT ah-VAHN luh koo-SHAY doo soh-LAY
responses.french: Arrivez trente minutes avant le coucher du soleil.
